slides.name: Title
slides.description: Hero or section title slide: short headline, optional subhead. Use for openings, chapter breaks, or closings when the outline is title-led with minimal bullets.

slides.name: Text
slides.description: Narrative or bullet-heavy body: headline plus markdown body for explanations, lists, timelines, and qualitative comparisons. Prefer when the outline has paragraphs or bullet lists but no markdown pipe table.

body_markdown.description: Main copy as markdown (lists, emphasis); no raw HTML.

slides.name: Table
slides.description: Tabular data slide: headline plus a GitHub-flavored markdown table in table_md. Use when the outline contains a markdown table (pipe rows). Do not choose this layout if there is no table.

table_md.description: Single markdown table; header row and alignment rows allowed.
